query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS impersonation_audit_log (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  emulator_user_id INT NOT NULL,
  emulator_name VARCHAR(256),
  emulator_email VARCHAR(256),
  emulated_user_id INT NOT NULL,
  emulated_name VARCHAR(256),
  emulated_email VARCHAR(256),
  started_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  ended_at BIGINT,
  actions_taken INT DEFAULT 0,
  ip_address VARCHAR(64),
  user_agent VARCHAR(512),
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS impersonation_audit_log (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  emulator_user_id INT NOT NULL,
  emulator_name VARCHAR(256),
  emulator_email VARCHAR(256),
  emulated_user_id INT NOT NULL,
  emulated_name VARCHAR(256),
  emulated_email VARCHAR(256),
  started_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  ended_at BIGINT,
  actions_taken INT DEFAULT 0,
  ip_address VARCHAR(64),
  user_agent VARCHAR(512),
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL
);
